name: zsys_read_cpuid_feature_flags
description: zSys::ReadCpuidFeatureFlags returns CPUID leaf 1 EDX feature flags after CPUID support and vendor checks.
known_limits: The smoke verifies normalized CPUID/MMX/signature-mask behavior on the runtime CPU.
Binary-safe verification remains pending because the current source uses compiler CPUID helper spelling outside the raw-assembly detect leaves.
